34 
PATIENT_SEX 
LABEL: 
Patient's Sex 
DESCRIPTION: Patient's sex. 
SHORT NAME: PATIENT_SEX 
LONG NAME: PATIENT_SEX 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
FILE(S): 
Demographic

SOURCE: 
Million Hearts Data Registry 
VALUES: 
M = male 
F = female 
Null/missing 
COMMENT: 
In 2025, this field was renamed to sex to comply
